cases.title: J-Rock Verse/Chorus
cases.summary: Straight driving hats, backbeat snare, crash-heavy chorus, and tom fills.

cases.title: J-Rock Gallop
cases.summary: Syncopated gallop kicks against eighth-note hats with ride-led chorus accents.

cases.title: Math Rock 7/8
cases.summary: Odd-meter groove with displaced snare accents and rotating tom answers.

cases.title: Math Rock Linear 5/4
cases.summary: Linear groove with ride ostinato, ghosted snare pickups, and low-to-high tom runs.

cases.title: Metal Double Bass
cases.summary: Continuous double-bass sixteenths with backbeat snare and cymbal changes.

cases.title: Metal Blast Beat
cases.summary: Alternating blast patterns with aggressive snare density and cymbal swaps.

cases.title: Funk Ghost Notes
cases.summary: Ghost-note-heavy snare groove with hat openings and syncopated kick placements.

cases.title: Blues Shuffle
cases.summary: Swung blues groove with triplet shuffle hats, backbeat snare, and a turnaround fill.

cases.title: Pop Anthem
cases.summary: Clean pop groove with tight backbeats, lift into open hats, and crash-heavy chorus downbeats.

cases.title: R&B Pocket
cases.summary: Laid-back half-time groove with ghosted snares, sparse kicks, and hat dynamics.

corpus.title: Synthetic rendered fixture suite
corpus.description: Rendered drum benchmark fixtures with known-good authored MIDI references.
